markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review SEO performance and define a strategy to regain stability.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**SEO volatility is the top priority.** Rankings for keywords like "AI recruiter" are fluctuating wildly (e.g., pos 12→25), causing instability.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [**Competitor HeyMilo's success is driven by a G2 award and a targeted backlink strategy.** They earn hundreds of backlinks on single blog posts, a key differentiator from alex.com.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [**Immediate homepage SEO tweaks are planned to stabilize rankings.** This includes changing the title tag and H1 to explicitly target "AI recruiter."](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [**AEO tracking is now active in CheckThat.** This tool monitors alex.com's presence in AI answer engines (e.g., ChatGPT) and provides historical data for 35 initial prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance & Volatility

  - [**Problem:** Significant SEO volatility is causing unstable keyword rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [**Impact:** Key keyword positions are dropping:](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - ["AI recruiter": 12 → 25 (13 positions)](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
      - ["AI interviewer": 19 positions](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - ["recruiter AI": 20 positions](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [**Context:** While volatile, this represents progress from a non-ranked position (\~90) in December.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Competitor Analysis (HeyMilo)

  - [**Goal:** Understand how competitor HeyMilo dominates "AI interviewer" and "AI recruiter" keywords despite a lower Authority Score (26) and fewer referring domains (\~500 vs. alex.com's \~800).](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [**Key Findings:**](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
      - **G2 Award:** A recent \#1 ranking on G2 for "AI Recruiter" likely provided a major, temporary ranking boost.
      - [**Targeted Backlink Strategy:** HeyMilo earns hundreds of backlinks on individual blog posts, a key differentiator from alex.com's strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
          - [Example: "AI Candidate Screening" post has 145 backlinks.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
      - [**Homepage Keyword Density:** HeyMilo's homepage explicitly uses target keywords in its H1 and H2s.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)

### Homepage SEO Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Stabilize rankings by making the homepage's purpose clearer to search engines.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [**Proposed Changes:**](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
      - [**Title Tag:** Change from "AI recruiting platform..." to "Your AI recruiter to interview everyone, hire the best | Alex."](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Explicitly targets the high-value keyword "AI recruiter."](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
      - [**H1 Tag:** Consolidate the main headline into a single, comprehensive H1.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Provides a clear, singular signal to search engines about the page's primary topic.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
      - [**Content:** Increase the density of "AI interviewer" and "AI interviewing" keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)

### Content & Publishing Plan

  - [**New Articles:** All approved articles will be published within the next few days.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [**Existing Articles:** Carly will refresh existing articles with new internal links and images.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [**Process:** Republish refreshed articles immediately upon completion.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This provides a steady stream of updated content, which can improve SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

### Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) Tracking

  - [**Tool:** CheckThat, a platform for tracking performance in AI answer engines (e.g., ChatGPT, Perplexity).](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [**Access:** Alex has a 90-day business plan trial.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [**Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [**Historical Data:** Provides immediate historical data for 35 initial prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [**Competitor Analysis:** Shows alex.com's citation share and sentiment vs. competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [**Note:** Claude AI is less likely to provide citations than other engines.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
      - [Publish all approved articles.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
      - [Begin refreshing existing articles for immediate republication.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [Conduct a competitive gap analysis on HeyMilo and deliver findings by next Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
  - [**Donald:**](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
      - [Implement the proposed homepage SEO changes (title tag, H1, keyword density).](https://fathom.video/share/yzK55jWFCYtwsSNyzgFtraP7jpkvecym?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
